Appearances:
Plaintiff Guru Kupra LLC, is present. Represented by Sheikh Amjad.
Attorney Michael Heath appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Michael Sillmanis present.
Attorney Jessica Bogo representing the defendant through limited scope.

The settlement attorney Jim Watson, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

The trial date of OCT-24-2011 is vacated.
